contents.title: AI Definition Response v1
contents.description: Canonical response format for term definitions used by GameNext, including provenance and links to contracts and code locations.

term.description: The term being defined (e.g., grimeAdhesion, CIC, nanite geometry).

definition.description: Human-readable explanation of the term as used in GameNext or mapped from external usage.

relatedSchemas.description: IDs or paths of schemas/contracts where this term appears or is formally defined.

items.description: Schema ID or contract identifier, such as a JSON Schema $id or game-next-* contract ID.

examples.description: Short usage examples or snippets referencing the term.

source.description: Provenance of the definition: internal docs/contracts (game-next-docs, authoritative), community/maintainer input (contributed), or AI-inferred mappings.

internalMapping.description: For internal GameNext terms, maps the term to concrete struct fields, schema paths, or engine bindings.

schemaPaths.description: JSON Pointer or dot-style paths into schemas where this term is a field or definition.

rustTypes.description: Fully-qualified Rust type or field paths where this term appears (e.g., crate::bci::VisualParams::mask_radius).

engineMappings.description: Optional engine-specific property names or bindings for this term (e.g., Unreal material parameter names).

meta.description: Optional metadata for indexing, versioning, or tagging.

version.description: Version tag for the definition entry, independent of schema version.

tags.description: Free-form tags for search and filtering (e.g., rendering, audio, bci, grime).
